title: Resolved Maps of Gas and Dust in a Massive Quiescent Galaxy at z=2 from INQUEST-JWST: Evidence of Accretion and Rejuvenation
summary: Quiescent galaxies in the distant universe exhibit a range of gas content that may indicate a variety of quenching processes are at play. Mapping the distribution and kinematics of the gas can illuminate its origins, but nearly all such observations have been unresolved. We present JWST/NIRSpec IFU observations of MRG-M0138, a gravitationally lensed, massive quiescent galaxy at $z\sim2$ observed as part of the INQUEST-JWST survey. We use Na I D absorption, which we detect in excess of the stellar absorption over most of the galaxy, to trace the kinematics and spatial distribution of the neutral gas in 219 spatial bins. The gas exhibits clear rotation that is kinematically aligned with the stellar disk. Both the gas and dust have a complex spatial structure, including an off-nuclear clump, a dust lane, and patches in the outer disk. The non-equilibrium distribution suggests that the gas was accreted. Analysis of the galaxy's star formation history supports this interpretation by indicating a rejuvenation event 500 Myrs ago. We identify two plausibly associated galaxies and suggest that tidal interactions are a likely source of the accreted gas. Our results indicate that some of the variation in gas content among early quiescent galaxies is not related to differences in gas consumption timescales. The detection of a gas clump at a projected distance of $\sim90$ pc from the known supermassive black hole illustrates a mechanism to fuel the episodic AGN feedback that may maintain quiescence.

AI.tldr: 利用JWST/NIRSpec IFU对红移约2的引力透镜现象星系MRG-M0138进行观测，通过Na I D吸收线追踪中性气体的分布与运动学，发现气体与恒星盘共转、存在非平衡结构（如离核团块、尘埃带），结合恒星形成历史揭示500 Myr前的再活跃事件，表明气体来自潮汐吸积，并解释了早期宁静星系气体含量差异的原因及AGN反馈燃料机制。
AI.motivation: 遥远宇宙中的宁静星系具有不同的气体含量，暗示多种熄灭机制在起作用，但此前对气体分布和运动学的观测几乎都是未分辨的，因此需要高空间分辨率的观测来追溯气体起源。
AI.method: 使用JWST/NIRSpec IFU对引力透镜星系MRG-M0138进行观测，在219个空间分块中利用Na I D吸收线（扣除恒星吸收后）追踪中性气体的运动学和空间分布。
AI.result: 气体呈现清晰的旋转运动，且与恒星盘运动学对齐；气体和尘埃具有复杂的空间结构，包括离核团块、尘埃带和外盘斑块；非平衡分布表明气体是吸积而来的；恒星形成历史分析显示500 Myr前存在再活跃事件；识别出两个可能相关的伴星系；在距离已知超大质量黑洞约90 pc处探测到气体团块。
AI.conclusion: 早期宁静星系的气体含量差异并非完全由气体消耗时标不同导致；潮汐相互作用是气体吸积的可能来源；探测到靠近超大质量黑洞的气体团块为间歇性AGN反馈提供燃料机制，有助于维持星系的宁静状态。

recommendation.reason: 该论文直接研究了一个强引力透镜星系（MRG-M0138）在z~2的高红移宁静星系中的气体和尘埃分布，使用了JWST/NIRSpec IFU高空间分辨率观测，核心科学问题（气体吸积、再活跃、AGN反馈）与用户兴趣高度吻合。论文涉及尘埃、气体运动学、恒星形成历史等用户高频关键词，且方法（IFU、吸收线）和主题（高红移星系、引力透镜）均与用户画像强匹配。
recommendation.topic_fit: 论文主题为高红移宁静星系中的气体和尘埃分布，利用引力透镜效应进行高分辨率研究，直接命中用户核心兴趣领域（强引力透镜、高红移星系、尘埃、气体）。
recommendation.method_fit: 使用JWST/NIRSpec IFU进行空间分辨的Na I D吸收线分析，结合引力透镜放大效应，方法先进且与用户关注的观测技术高度一致。
recommendation.author_fit: 作者列表中无用户核心作者（如daizhong liu、reinhard genzel等），但论文来自INQUEST-JWST项目，与用户关注的JWST观测方向一致。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 首次对高红移宁静星系进行空间分辨的中性气体和尘埃分布研究，揭示了气体吸积和再活跃事件，具有较高新颖性。
recommendation.negative_reason: 无负面因素；论文完全符合用户兴趣，未涉及用户不感兴趣的领域（如纯宇宙学、粒子物理等）。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 遥远宇宙中的宁静星系表现出多种气体含量，这可能表明多种淬灭过程在起作用。绘制气体的分布和运动学可以揭示其起源，但几乎所有此类观测都未得到空间分辨。我们展示了作为INQUEST-JWST巡天一部分的JWST/NIRSpec IFU对MRG-M0138的观测，这是一个引力透镜化的、大质量宁静星系，红移$z\sim2$。我们利用Na I D吸收线（我们在大部分星系中探测到其超出恒星吸收的部分）来追踪219个空间分 bin 中中性气体的运动学和空间分布。气体表现出清晰的旋转，且运动学上与恒星盘对齐。气体和尘埃都具有复杂的空间结构，包括一个离核团块、一条尘埃带以及外盘中的斑块。这种非平衡分布表明气体是被吸积的。对星系恒星形成历史的分析支持了这一解释，表明在500 Myr前发生了一次复苏事件。我们识别出两个可能相关的星系，并认为潮汐相互作用是吸积气体的可能来源。我们的结果表明，早期宁静星系中气体含量的一些差异与气体消耗时标的差异无关。在距离已知超大质量黑洞投影距离约$\sim90$ pc处探测到一个气体团块，说明了一种为可能维持宁静状态的间歇性AGN反馈提供燃料的机制。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：早期宁静星系的气体含量差异并非完全由气体消耗时标不同导致；潮汐相互作用是气体吸积的可能来源；探测到靠近超大质量黑洞的气体团块为间歇性AGN反馈提供燃料机制，有助于维持星系的宁静状态。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: JWST/NIRSpec observations of the lensed quiescent galaxy MRG-M0138 at \(z=1.948\) . Top left: JWST/NIRCam image of the lensing galaxy cluster MACS J0138.0–2155 obtained with the F115W, F150W, and F356W filters. MRG-M0138 appears as a bright, red, multiply imaged source. The yellow box indicates the NIRSpec IFU field of view. Top right: Zoomed-in view centered on the IFU field of view. The overlaid black grid delineates the spatial bins (219 in total). Bottom: The spectrum extracted from one example spatial bin (black), with the \(1\sigma\) uncertainty shown as the grey shaded region. The red curve represents the bestfit stellar continuum and nebular emission model derived using pPXF . Prominent spectral features, including Na I D and Ca II H \(\&\) K, are indicated.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：红移\(z=1.948\)的透镜化宁静星系MRG-M0138的JWST/NIRSpec观测。左上：使用F115W、F150W和F356W滤光片获得的透镜星系团MACS J0138.0–2155的JWST/NIRCam图像。MRG-M0138呈现为一个明亮、红色、多重成像的源。黄色方框表示NIRSpec IFU视场。右上：以IFU视场为中心的放大视图。叠加的黑色网格描绘了空间分 bin（共219个）。底部：从一个示例空间分 bin（黑色）提取的光谱，\(1\sigma\)不确定度显示为灰色阴影区域。红色曲线代表使用pPXF得出的最佳拟合恒星连续谱和星云发射模型。标出了显著的光谱特征，包括Na I D和Ca II H \(\&\) K。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Na I D absorption lines observed in an example spatial bin (same bin used in Figure 1 ) in the G140M spectra. Left panels: The observed spectrum \(F\) (black) is compared to the best-fit pPXF stellar model (orange) with [Na/Fe]* = 0 in the top panel and [Na/Fe]* = +0.6 in the bottom panel. Wavelengths are shifted to the systemic rest-frame of the galaxy. Right panels: The corresponding gas absorption spectra \(F_{gas}=F/F_{*}\) (black) and the best-fit Voigt model (orange) with [Na/Fe]* = 0 in the top panel and [Na/Fe]* = +0.6 in the bottom panel. In all panels, the green dashed lines show the rest-frame wavelengths of the Na I D doublet lines.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：在G140M光谱中一个示例空间分 bin（与图1中使用的分 bin相同）中观测到的Na I D吸收线。左图：将观测光谱\(F\)（黑色）与最佳拟合pPXF恒星模型（橙色）进行比较，上图中[Na/Fe]* = 0，下图中[Na/Fe]* = +0.6。波长已转换到星系的系统静止参考系。右图：相应的气体吸收光谱\(F_{gas}=F/F_{*}\)（黑色）和最佳拟合Voigt模型（橙色），上图中[Na/Fe]* = 0，下图中[Na/Fe]* = +0.6。在所有图中，绿色虚线显示Na I D双线在静止参考系中的波长。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Corner plot of the posterior distributions for the Partial Covering fraction Voigt profile parameters characterizing excess Na I D absorption, obtained after dividing the observed spectrum by the best-fit stellar continuum pPXF model, in the same spatial bin used in the Figure 1 and 2 . For each parameter, the orange line marks the median, and the black dashed lines indicate the \(16^{\text{th}}\) and \(84^{\text{th}}\) percentiles. In addition to the model parameters, we include an extra row and column for the derived quantity \(\log(N\times C_{f})\) . Although not a free parameter in the fit, this combination is more tightly constrained than either \(\log N_{Na~I}\) or \(C_{f}\) individually, highlighting a key degeneracy in the model.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：表征过量Na I D吸收的部分覆盖分数Voigt轮廓参数的后验分布角图，这些参数是在将观测光谱除以最佳拟合恒星连续谱pPXF模型后，在与图1和图2相同的空间分 bin中获得的。对于每个参数，橙色线标记中位数，黑色虚线表示\(16^{\text{th}}\)和\(84^{\text{th}}\)百分位数。除了模型参数外，我们还为导出量\(\log(N\times C_{f})\)增加了一行和一列。虽然这不是拟合中的自由参数，但该组合比单独的\(\log N_{Na~I}\)或\(C_{f}\)受到更严格的约束，突出了模型中的一个关键简并性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Radial profiles of the gaseous Na I D equivalent width ( \(EW_{gas}\) ), measured from the residual absorption after dividing the observed spectrum by the best-fit stellar continuum model. The elliptical radius is defined as \((x^{2}+(y/q)^{2})^{1/2}\) , where \(x\) and \(y\) are projections of a bin onto the major and minor axes of the galaxy, respectively, and \(q=0.28\) is the mean axial ratio of the starlight in the F200W filter. Radial profiles are shown for two assumed stellar sodium abundances: [Na/Fe]* \(=0.0\) ( left panel ) and [Na/Fe]* \(=+0.6\) ( right panel ). We averaged the \(EW_{gas}\) measurements from the G140M and G235M observations. In both plots, the dashed red line denotes the bulge effective radius \((R_{e,bulge})\) , and the dot dashed green line denotes the effective radius of the entire galaxy \((R_{e})\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：气态Na I D等值宽度（\(EW_{gas}\)）的径向轮廓，通过将观测光谱除以最佳拟合恒星连续谱模型后的残余吸收测量得到。椭圆半径定义为\((x^{2}+(y/q)^{2})^{1/2}\)，其中\(x\)和\(y\)分别是分 bin在星系长轴和短轴上的投影，\(q=0.28\)是F200W滤光片中星光平均轴比。显示了两种假设恒星钠丰度下的径向轮廓：[Na/Fe]* \(=0.0\)（左图）和[Na/Fe]* \(=+0.6\)（右图）。我们平均了来自G140M和G235M观测的\(EW_{gas}\)测量值。在两幅图中，红色虚线表示核球有效半径\((R_{e,bulge})\)，绿色点划线表示整个星系的有效半径\((R_{e})\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Detection of interstellar Ca II H, K absorption in the spatially integrated spectrum. Left panel : The observed stacked spectrum (black) is compared to the best-fit pPXF stellar model (orange). Middle panel : The ratio of the observed spectrum to the best-fit stellar model (black) shows evidence of excess absorption at Ca II H, K, which is modelled (orange) as discussed in Section III.4 . Right panel : As in the middle panel, but in the wavelength region around Na I D. The sodium absorption is much stronger, explaining why it is detectable in individual spatial bins.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：在空间积分光谱中探测到星际Ca II H、K吸收。左图：将观测到的叠加光谱（黑色）与最佳拟合pPXF恒星模型（橙色）进行比较。中图：观测光谱与最佳拟合恒星模型之比（黑色）显示出在Ca II H、K处有过量吸收的证据，如第III.4节所述，该吸收被建模（橙色）。右图：与中图相同，但波长区域围绕Na I D。钠吸收要强得多，这解释了为什么它可以在单个空间分 bin中被探测到。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Tests of the robustness of the gas kinematics measured from Na I D. The left and right columns focus on the velocities ( \(V_{gas}\) ) and velocity dispersions ( \(\sigma_{gas}\) ), respectively. Top row: Comparisons of the gas kinematics extracted from the two observations (G140M and G235M), assuming \({[Na/Fe]^{*}}=0\) . Middle row: Comparisons of the gas kinematics inferred when assuming [Na/Fe]* = 0 or +0.6 in the analysis, using the G140M observations. Bottom row: Illustration of the influence of the covering fraction \(C_{f}\) on the gas kinematics. We calculated the median velocity and velocity dispersion of the posterior samples when the \(C_{f}\) value is in top 10th percentile ( \(V_{gas,\uparrow C_{f}},~\sigma_{gas,\uparrow C_{f}}\) ) and bottom 10th percentile ( \(V_{gas,\downarrow C_{f}},~\sigma_{gas,\downarrow C_{f}}\) ). In the top two rows, the red dashed line is the 1:1 line, while the green line and \(1\sigma\) error band shows a linear fit. In all the plots, the units of velocity and velocity dispersion are \(km~s^{-1}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图6：从Na I D测量的气体运动学稳健性测试。左列和右列分别关注速度（\(V_{gas}\)）和速度弥散（\(\sigma_{gas}\)）。第一行：假设\({[Na/Fe]^{*}}=0\)时，从两次观测（G140M和G235M）提取的气体运动学比较。第二行：使用G140M观测，假设[Na/Fe]* = 0或+0.6时推断的气体运动学比较。第三行：说明覆盖分数\(C_{f}\)对气体运动学的影响。我们计算了当\(C_{f}\)值处于前10百分位数（\(V_{gas,\uparrow C_{f}},~\sigma_{gas,\uparrow C_{f}}\)）和后10百分位数（\(V_{gas,\downarrow C_{f}},~\sigma_{gas,\downarrow C_{f}}\)）时后验样本的中位速度和速度弥散。在前两行中，红色虚线是1:1线，而绿色线和\(1\sigma\)误差带显示线性拟合。在所有图中，速度和速度弥散的单位是\(km~s^{-1}\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Maps of the distribution and kinematics of gas and dust. (A) Reconstructed image of the galaxy in the source plane using the NIRCam F115W, F150W, and F356W filters as in Newman et al. ( 2025 ) . (B) The stellar velocity field. (C) The velocity of Na I D, assuming \({[Na/Fe]^{*}}=0\) . (D) The \(C_{f}\times N_{Na~I}\) map, assuming \({[Na/Fe]^{*}}=0\) . This product represents the average column density over the spatial bin. (E) The \(C_{f}\times N_{Na~I}\) map assuming \({[Na/Fe]^{*}}=+0.6\) . (F) The F115W–F200W color. (G) The \(A_{V}\) map derived from our SPS modeling. Dotted bins mark regions that did not meet the \(\Delta AIC\) threshold for robust gas kinematics. The white cross to the lower-right of the center was excluded due to contamination from SN Encore (Pierel et al. , 2024 ) . The origin of the coordinate system in all spatial maps is set at the galaxy’s center, as determined from the surface brightness peak reported by Newman et al. ( 2025 ) . All gas quantities represent the average of the G140M and G235M measurements. The axis units are arcsec ( \(1^{\prime\prime}=8.6\) kpc).
figures.caption_zh: 图7：气体和尘埃分布与运动学图。（A）使用NIRCam F115W、F150W和F356W滤光片在源平面重建的星系图像，如Newman等人（2025）所述。（B）恒星速度场。（C）假设\({[Na/Fe]^{*}}=0\)时Na I D的速度。（D）假设\({[Na/Fe]^{*}}=0\)时的\(C_{f}\times N_{Na~I}\)图。该乘积代表空间分 bin上的平均柱密度。（E）假设\({[Na/Fe]^{*}}=+0.6\)时的\(C_{f}\times N_{Na~I}\)图。（F）F115W–F200W颜色。（G）从我们的SPS建模导出的\(A_{V}\)图。虚线分 bin标记未达到稳健气体运动学\(\Delta AIC\)阈值的区域。中心右下方的白色叉号因SN Encore（Pierel等人，2024）的污染而被排除。所有空间图中坐标系的原点设置在星系中心，由Newman等人（2025）报告的表面亮度峰值确定。所有气体量代表G140M和G235M测量值的平均值。轴的单位是角秒（\(1^{\prime\prime}=8.6\) kpc）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: A comparison of the gas and stellar velocity fields. The left and right panels show results assuming \({[Na/Fe]^{*}}=0\) and +0.6, respectively, in the analysis. The stellar and gas velocities are clearly correlated, with the gas lagging the stellar rotation speed by an amount that depends on the assumed [Na/Fe]*. Each spatial bin that passes our significance threshold (Section III.3 ) is plotted, using the average of the G140M and G235M data sets. The red dashed lines represent \(V_{star}=V_{gas}\) , and the green solid lines with \(1\sigma\) error bands show linear fits. The purple diamonds indicate the region along the dust lane, while the orange squares mark the gas close to the galaxy center. These regions of enhanced gas and dust do not appear to be kinematically irregular.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：气体和恒星速度场的比较。左图和右图分别显示分析中假设\({[Na/Fe]^{*}}=0\)和+0.6的结果。恒星和气体速度明显相关，气体滞后于恒星旋转速度的量取决于假设的[Na/Fe]*。绘制了通过显著性阈值（第III.3节）的每个空间分 bin，使用了G140M和G235M数据集的平均值。红色虚线表示\(V_{star}=V_{gas}\)，绿色实线及其\(1\sigma\)误差带显示线性拟合。紫色菱形表示沿尘埃带的区域，橙色方块表示靠近星系中心的气体。这些气体和尘埃增强的区域在运动学上似乎没有不规则性。

title: Dust enrichment from core-collapse supernovae and extinction curves in the high-redshift universe
comment: Submitted to A&A - 13 pages, 11 figures - Appendix: 2 pages, 6 figures
summary: Recent JWST observations have revealed that some galaxies at $z \gtrsim 7$ generally exhibit relatively flat ultraviolet (UV) attenuation curves and a weak UV bump. These features suggest that the first dust grains formed rapidly, possibly originating from core-collapse supernovae (SNe). We investigate the time evolution of grain size distributions and extinction curves in the early phase of dust enrichment for different parameters of progenitor stars, rotation velocities, metallicity, and interstellar medium densities, including the effect of the reverse shock. We model a single starburst system assuming an initial mass function. Extinction curves are calculated from the grain size distribution for each dust species. The total dust-to-stellar mass ratio at $30 \,\mathrm{Myr}$ is $M_\mathrm{dust}/M_\star \sim 10^{-3}$ before the passage of the reverse shock, but we find it to be at most $M_\mathrm{dust}/M_\star \sim 10^{-5}$ due to the destruction effect of the reverse shock. This effect destroys grains smaller than $\sim 10\,\mathrm{nm}$ and makes amorphous carbon the dominant species, resulting in a flatter extinction curve with a wide bump at $2500\,\mathrm{\mathring{A}}$ compared to the no-reverse shock models. We find that our models are consistent with the observed attenuation curve and emissivity of high-redshift galaxies and show that the reverse shock processing significantly affects dust enrichment and grain properties such as extinction curves and emissivity in supernova yields for high-redshift galaxies.

AI.tldr: 本文通过模型研究发现，反向激波会显著影响高红移星系中由超新星产生的尘埃，使其小颗粒（<10 nm）被破坏，无定形碳成为主要尘埃成分，导致消光曲线变平且在2500 Å处出现宽凸起，总尘埃-恒星质量比从~10^{-3}降至~10^{-5}。模型结果与JWST观测的高红移星系平坦紫外消光曲线和弱UV凸起特征一致。
AI.motivation: 最近JWST观测发现z≳7的星系具有相对平坦的紫外消光曲线和较弱的UV凸起，这表明第一批尘埃颗粒可能来自核心坍缩超新星并快速形成。然而，反向激波对尘埃的影响尚不明确，需要系统研究反向激波如何影响早期星系的尘埃演化、颗粒大小分布和消光特性。
AI.method: 研究人员构建了单次星暴系统模型，采用初始质量函数，考虑了不同的前身星参数、旋转速度、金属丰度和星际介质密度，并纳入反向激波效应。通过计算每种尘埃物种的颗粒大小分布，推导出消光曲线，并比较有无反向激波情况下的差异。
AI.result: 反向激波通过前，30 Myr时尘埃-恒星质量比为M_dust/M_star ~ 10^{-3}；反向激波后，该比值降至~10^{-5}。反向激波摧毁了小于~10 nm的颗粒，使无定形碳成为主要尘埃种类，导致消光曲线变平，在2500 Å处出现宽凸起。模型结果与高红移星系的观测衰减曲线和发射率一致。
AI.conclusion: 反向激波处理显著影响超新星产出的尘埃富集和颗粒特性（如消光曲线和发射率），是解释高红移星系平坦紫外消光曲线和弱UV凸起的关键因素，表明反向激波在早期宇宙尘埃演化中起重要作用。

recommendation.reason: 论文聚焦于高红移星系尘埃消光曲线，与用户画像中的dust、starburst、JWST等关键词匹配，但未涉及强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学或多相气体等核心兴趣领域，且无核心作者参与。
recommendation.topic_fit: 中等匹配：涉及高红移星系尘埃演化，与dust、starburst相关，但非强引力透镜或高红移动力学核心主题。
recommendation.method_fit: 低匹配：采用理论模型和数值模拟，而非用户偏好的透镜观测或动力学分析。
recommendation.author_fit: 无匹配：作者列表中无用户核心作者。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中等：反向激波对尘埃的影响有一定新颖性，但未直接关联用户主要研究方向。
recommendation.negative_reason: 未涉及强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、多相气体或偏振等优先主题。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 最近的詹姆斯·韦伯空间望远镜（JWST）观测揭示，一些红移 $z \gtrsim 7$ 的星系通常表现出相对平坦的紫外（UV）衰减曲线和微弱的UV凸起。这些特征表明，第一批尘埃颗粒可能迅速形成，可能源自核心坍缩超新星（SNe）。我们研究了在尘埃富集的早期阶段，不同前身星参数、旋转速度、金属丰度和星际介质密度下，包括反向激波效应在内的颗粒尺寸分布和消光曲线的时间演化。我们假设一个初始质量函数，对单一星暴系统进行建模。消光曲线根据每种尘埃物种的颗粒尺寸分布计算。在反向激波通过之前，$30 \,\mathrm{Myr}$ 时的总尘埃与恒星质量比为 $M_\mathrm{dust}/M_\star \sim 10^{-3}$，但由于反向激波的破坏效应，我们发现该比值最多为 $M_\mathrm{dust}/M_\star \sim 10^{-5}$。这种效应摧毁了尺寸小于 $\sim 10\,\mathrm{nm}$ 的颗粒，并使无定形碳成为主要物种，从而导致与无反向激波模型相比，在 $2500\,\mathrm{\mathring{A}}$ 处出现更宽的凸起，消光曲线更为平坦。我们发现，我们的模型与高红移星系的观测衰减曲线和发射率一致，并表明反向激波处理显著影响超新星产出的尘埃富集和颗粒特性（如消光曲线和发射率），这对于高红移星系尤为重要。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，反向激波处理显著影响超新星产出的尘埃富集和颗粒特性（如消光曲线和发射率），是解释高红移星系平坦紫外消光曲线和弱UV凸起的关键因素，表明反向激波在早期宇宙尘埃演化中起重要作用。

title: A quantum theory of the alignment and polarization of very small dust grains
summary: Context. Anomalous microwave emission (AME) is a component of interstellar medium emission peaking at 10-60 GHz. Its polarization is both a CMB foreground and a probe of the alignment physics of very small dust grains. Aims. We quantify when the purely rotational electric-dipole emission from very small interstellar grains (spinning dust/AME) can become measurably polarized, and we quantify related UV/optical/IR polarization diagnostics. Methods. We develop a quantum-mechanical symmetric-top model for an axisymmetric very small grain and express polarized emission and absorption coefficients in terms of irreducible density-matrix moments. Alignment is driven by anisotropic illumination; we solve a simplified two-manifold pumping model and compute (polarized) emission and absorption signatures for different dipole configurations and grain-size distributions. Results. Anisotropic illumination can generate polarized spinning-dust emission; in optimal geometries, polarization fractions near the emission peak reach the percent level, while more modest anisotropies reduce the polarization fraction. The same physics predicts polarized UV/optical/IR absorption that can be appreciable in strongly illuminated environments, whereas IR vibrational emission is predicted to be negligibly polarized. Conclusions. Spinning-dust polarization depends on radiation anisotropy, dipole geometry, and the competition between alignment pumping and depolarization by rotational emission. Joint constraints from AME polarization and UV/optical/IR absorption polarimetry provide a direct test of alignment by anisotropic radiation fields and help bound polarized microwave foregrounds.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了非常小的星际尘埃颗粒（旋转尘埃/AME）在10-60 GHz频段的异常微波发射（AME）的极化特性，分析了各向异性辐射场如何通过量子力学对称陀螺模型产生可测量的极化信号，并给出了极化分数在最优几何条件下可达百分之一的结论。
AI.motivation: AME的极化既是CMB前景污染源，也是极小尘埃颗粒排列物理的探针，作者希望量化旋转尘埃发射何时能产生可测量的极化，并给出相关的UV/光/IR极化诊断手段。
AI.method: 发展了一个轴对称极小尘埃颗粒的量子力学对称陀螺模型，用不可约密度矩阵矩表示极化的发射和吸收系数；通过简化的两流形泵浦模型求解各向异性辐射场驱动的颗粒排列，计算了不同偶极构型和颗粒尺寸分布下的（极化）发射和吸收特征。
AI.result: 各向异性辐射可以产生极化的旋转尘埃发射；在最优几何条件下，发射峰附近的极化分数可达百分之一水平，而更温和的各向异性会降低极化分数；该机制预测的UV/光/IR极化吸收在强辐照环境下可观，而IR振动发射的极化可忽略不计。
AI.conclusion: 旋转尘埃极化取决于辐射各向异性、偶极几何以及排列泵浦与旋转发射退极化之间的竞争。AME极化与UV/光/IR吸收偏振测量的联合约束可直接检验各向异性辐射场驱动的颗粒排列假说，并有助于约束极化的微波前景。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题为极小尘埃颗粒的量子排列与极化，与用户Zotero画像中的dust、polarization、interstellar medium等关键词有部分匹配，但用户核心兴趣是强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学与多相气体，本文不涉及透镜、高红移星系或核心作者，仅因尘埃和极化关键词获得中等分数。
recommendation.topic_fit: 部分匹配，用户画像包含dust和polarization，但核心兴趣是强引力透镜和高红移星系，本文不涉及这些主题。
recommendation.method_fit: 不匹配，本文使用量子力学对称陀螺模型，与用户常用的引力透镜建模、高红移星系观测方法无关。
recommendation.author_fit: 不匹配，作者Boy Lankhaar不在用户核心作者列表中。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中等，本文提出量子模型解释尘埃极化，但用户更关注高红移星系和透镜研究，新颖性对用户而言有限。
recommendation.negative_reason: 不涉及强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、多相气体等用户核心兴趣领域。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 背景。异常微波发射（AME）是星际介质发射的一个组成部分，峰值在10-60 GHz。其偏振既是CMB的前景，也是极小尘埃颗粒排列物理的探针。目的。我们量化了极小星际颗粒（旋转尘埃/AME）的纯旋转电偶极发射何时可以变得可测量地偏振，并量化了相关的紫外/光学/红外偏振诊断。方法。我们为轴对称的极小颗粒开发了一个量子力学对称陀螺模型，并用不可约密度矩阵矩表达了偏振发射和吸收系数。排列由各向异性照明驱动；我们求解了一个简化的二流形泵浦模型，并计算了不同偶极构型和颗粒尺寸分布下的（偏振）发射和吸收特征。结果。各向异性照明可以产生偏振的旋转尘埃发射；在最佳几何条件下，发射峰值附近的偏振分数达到百分之一水平，而更适度的各向异性会降低偏振分数。相同的物理机制预测了在强照明环境中可观的紫外/光学/红外偏振吸收，而红外振动发射预计偏振可忽略不计。结论。旋转尘埃偏振取决于辐射各向异性、偶极几何以及排列泵浦与旋转发射退极化之间的竞争。来自AME偏振和紫外/光学/红外吸收偏振测量的联合约束为各向异性辐射场驱动的排列假说提供了直接检验，并有助于约束偏振的微波前景。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：旋转尘埃极化取决于辐射各向异性、偶极几何以及排列泵浦与旋转发射退极化之间的竞争。AME极化与UV/光/IR吸收偏振测量的联合约束可直接检验各向异性辐射场驱动的颗粒排列假说，并有助于约束极化的微波前景。

The curves are computed for \(T_{rot}=100\,{K}\) , \(U=1\) , \(w=0.3\) , \(\hat{\mu}_{anis}=0.6\) , and grain shape parameter \(s=0.5\) .

A radiation field anisotropy of \(w=1\) is assumed. Inside the figures, the cases of a fully parallel and perpendicularly aligned dipole moment are shown, as well as the case of the shape-derived dipole moment. Units of \(\eta_{I,Q}(a)\) are \({erg\ s^{-1}\ Hz^{-1}\ sr^{-1}}\) .

A radiation field anisotropy of \(w=1\) is assumed. Inside the figures, the cases of a fully parallel and perpendicularly aligned dipole moment are shown, as well as the case of the shape-derived dipole moment. Units of \(\eta_{I,Q}\) are \({erg\ s^{-1}\ Hz^{-1}\ sr^{-1}\ H^{-1}}\) .

title: Euclid preparation. Refining input galaxy shape distributions for shear calibration simulations
comment: This paper is published on behalf of the Euclid Consortium. 24 pages, 25 figures, 6 tables. Submitted to A&A
summary: The Euclid Wide Survey (EWS) will cover the majority of the extragalactic sky with a resolution similar to the Hubble Space Telescope. This unprecedented data set will introduce a new era of precision cosmology. However, systematic effects need to be controlled better than ever. One of the sources of systematic uncertainties in weak gravitational lensing are biases introduced during the shear measurement. Determining these biases precisely allows the calibration of cosmological measurements to within Euclid's required accuracy. The simulations that are used to determine such biases, need to resemble the real observations. In this work, we aim to learn distributions of galaxy shape parameters from real Euclid data and use the new information to augment the morphological information in the Flagship galaxy mock catalogue. The morphology is extracted using single and double-Sérsic model fits to the real data, for which we use SourceXtractor++. We train our pipeline on deep Euclid observations of a field with rich auxiliary data and then use it to simulate EWS-like data. In these simulations we compare the multiplicative bias between the morphology from the Flagship catalogue, the trained single-Sérsic morphology, and the trained double-Sérsic morphology. We find that the image simulations with the updated morphology result in a percent-level change in the multiplicative shear bias compared to the original morphology from Flagship. This bias exceeds Euclid's tight error budget by a factor of five and underlines the need for this work. Furthermore, we study the sensitivity of the multiplicative bias to key morphological parameters and show that our approach satisfies the requirements for the cosmology analysis with the first data release of Euclid.

AI.tldr: 本文利用 Euclid 巡天的真实数据学习星系形态参数分布，改进了星系模拟中的形态信息，将剪切测量的乘性偏差控制在 Euclid 第一数据发布所需的精度范围内。
AI.motivation: Euclid 巡天数据需要极高的系统误差控制水平，而弱引力透镜剪切测量中的偏差（尤其是乘性偏差）是主要系统误差来源之一。现有仿真使用的星系形态与实际观测存在差异，导致偏差超出 Euclid 的严格误差预算。
AI.method: 使用 SourceXtractor++ 对真实 Euclid 数据进行单/双 Sérsic 模型拟合，提取星系形态参数分布；将这些分布用于改进 Flagship 星系模拟目录的形态信息；通过图像仿真比较原始形态、训练后的单 Sérsic 形态和双 Sérsic 形态下的乘性剪切偏差。
AI.result: 更新后的形态模拟使得乘性剪切偏差相对于原始 Flagship 形态发生了百分量级的变化；该偏差超过 Euclid 严格误差预算的五倍；同时证实该方法满足 Euclid 第一数据发布宇宙学分析的要求。
AI.conclusion: 使用真实数据学习的星系形态分布能够显著改善模拟精度，是满足 Euclid 高精度宇宙学测量需求的必要步骤。

recommendation.reason: 该论文属于弱引力透镜剪切校准方法学，与用户强引力透镜（特别是星系-星系强透镜）核心兴趣方向不同。用户重点关注高红移星系动力学、运动学、偏振和多相气体，而本文聚焦于Euclid巡天的系统误差控制，科学问题不直接相关。虽然涉及引力透镜，但属于弱透镜宇宙学，非用户主要领域。
recommendation.topic_fit: 弱引力透镜剪切校准，与用户强引力透镜（星系-星系强透镜）及高红移星系研究主题匹配度低。
recommendation.method_fit: 使用Sérsic模型拟合星系形态进行模拟，与用户常用的强透镜建模、高红移气体/尘埃观测方法不匹配。
recommendation.author_fit: 作者列表为Euclid合作组，无用户核心作者（如daizhong liu, jianhang chen等）。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 方法学改进对Euclid任务重要，但非用户领域前沿。
recommendation.negative_reason: 属于弱引力透镜宇宙学，非用户强引力透镜核心领域；不涉及高红移星系动力学、多相气体等用户优先主题。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 欧几里得广域巡天（EWS）将以与哈勃空间望远镜相似的分辨率覆盖大部分河外天区。这一前所未有的数据集将开启精确宇宙学的新纪元。然而，系统效应需要比以往任何时候都更严格地控制。弱引力透镜中系统不确定性的来源之一是剪切测量过程中引入的偏差。精确确定这些偏差可以校准宇宙学测量，使其达到欧几里得任务所需的精度。用于确定此类偏差的模拟需要接近真实观测。在这项工作中，我们旨在从真实的欧几里得数据中学习星系形状参数的分布，并利用这些新信息来增强Flagship星系模拟星表中的形态信息。形态学通过使用SourceXtractor++对真实数据进行单Sérsic和双Sérsic模型拟合来提取。我们在具有丰富辅助数据的深场欧几里得观测数据上训练我们的流程，然后使用它来模拟类似EWS的数据。在这些模拟中，我们比较了来自Flagship星表的形态、训练后的单Sérsic形态和训练后的双Sérsic形态之间的乘性偏差。我们发现，与Flagship的原始形态相比，使用更新后的形态进行的图像模拟导致乘性剪切偏差发生百分之一量级的变化。这一偏差超出欧几里得严格误差预算的五倍，凸显了这项工作的必要性。此外，我们研究了乘性偏差对关键形态参数的敏感性，并表明我们的方法满足欧几里得首次数据发布中宇宙学分析的要求。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：使用真实数据学习的星系形态分布能够显著改善模拟精度，是满足 Euclid 高精度宇宙学测量需求的必要步骤。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The COSMOS field as observed by Euclid with the corresponding MER tiles at EWS depth. The deep field covers about the same area with smaller tiles. We also show the HEALpix belonging to each tile and the underlying galaxy density in the background.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：欧几里得观测的COSMOS场，以及EWS深度下对应的MER图块。深场覆盖大致相同的区域，但使用更小的图块。我们还展示了每个图块所属的HEALpix以及背景中底层的星系密度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Representative mask for one of the used tiles. We show the stellar masks, as well as the ghost masks, and custom masks for bright objects.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：其中一个使用图块的代表性掩模。我们展示了恒星掩模、鬼像掩模以及针对明亮天体的自定义掩模。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: SExtractor parameters for the segmentation and detection.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：用于分割和检测的SExtractor参数。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Fitted parameters of the single-Sérsic model. 1 1 1 We use the subscript i to denote initial values, which can be read off in the initial column. The initial values themselves refer to the output parameters of the detection and segmentation run with SExtractor .
figures.caption_zh: 表2：单Sérsic模型的拟合参数。1 1 1 我们使用下标i表示初始值，可在初始列中读取。初始值本身指的是使用SExtractor进行检测和分割运行的输出参数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Difference between joint and individual fitting. We notice that the residuals for a joint fit look like noise, while the individual fitting has clear structure. The fainter galaxy is over-corrected, because flux of the brighter one is being associated with it.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：联合拟合与单独拟合之间的差异。我们注意到联合拟合的残差看起来像噪声，而单独拟合则有清晰的结构。较暗的星系被过度校正，因为较亮星系的流量被关联到它上面。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Generic example of model fitting on a \(150\times 150\) pixel cutout. Stars are not fitted for. Both residuals look consistent with noise at the modeled positions indicating that the fitting works well.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：在\(150\times 150\)像素切片上进行模型拟合的通用示例。恒星未被拟合。两个残差在建模位置看起来都与噪声一致，表明拟合效果良好。

figures.caption_en: Table 3: Fitted parameters of the double-Sérsic model. 3 3 3 We use the subscript \({i}\) to denote initial values, which can be read off in the initial column. The initial values themselves refer to the output parameters of the detection and segmentation run with SExtractor .
figures.caption_zh: 表3：双Sérsic模型的拟合参数。3 3 3 我们使用下标\({i}\)表示初始值，可在初始列中读取。初始值本身指的是使用SExtractor进行检测和分割运行的输出参数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Simulated stellar densities in the COSMOS field compared to the observed ones and the masked stars. The observed distribution was determined using \(\texttt{POINT\_LIKE\_PROB}>0.8\) as a cut for the MER catalogue.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：COSMOS场中模拟的恒星密度与观测到的恒星密度以及被掩蔽的恒星进行比较。观测分布是使用\(\texttt{POINT\_LIKE\_PROB}>0.8\)作为MER星表的截断条件确定的。

title: Predicted number counts and clustering of Hi galaxies from future radio surveys
summary: The 21cm emission line from neutral hydrogen (HI) contained within galaxies provides a way to make accurate spectroscopic redshift determinations in the radio part of the spectrum. Large radio arrays such as SKA-MID are coming online that will have the sensitivity and survey time required to catalogue hundreds of thousands to millions of HI galaxies, opening up the possibility of studying the cosmological large scale structure using this technique. The expected number counts and clustering properties of the galaxies are still quite poorly understood however. We use three different simulated galaxy catalogues to predict the properties of the HI galaxy distribution that SKA-MID will be able to observe, along with estimates of the error on these predictions due to modelling uncertainty. The simulations in question are from S$^3$-SAX (semi-analytic models based on the Millennium dark matter-only simulation); GAEA (an updated semi-analytic model partially calibrated on hydrodynamical simulations); and IllustrisTNG (a hydrodynamical simulation). We present predictions for galaxy number counts as a function of sensitivity cut and redshift, and use these to forecast the cosmological performance of a proposed SKA-MID cosmological survey. Finally, we fit a halo occupation distribution model to low-redshift angular correlation functions to constrain clustering properties of multiple sub-volumes of the simulations to gain insight into the expected variation (sample variance) over smaller survey areas.

AI.tldr: 本文利用三种不同的模拟星系目录（S^3-SAX、GAEA和IllustrisTNG）预测了SKA-MID射电望远镜观测到的中性氢（HI）星系分布特性，包括数量计数、聚类性质，并评估了建模不确定性对预测的影响，最后通过HOD模型拟合给出了宇宙学调查的性能预测。
AI.motivation: SKA-MID等大型射电阵列即将上线，有望通过HI 21cm发射线探测数百万个星系，从而研究宇宙大尺度结构，但目前对HI星系的数量计数和聚类性质的理解仍不够充分。
AI.method: 使用三种不同的模拟星系目录（半解析模型S^3-SAX、GAEA以及流体动力学模拟IllustrisTNG）预测HI星系分布，并评估建模不确定性导致的误差；同时利用HOD模型拟合低红移角相关函数以约束聚类特性。
AI.result: 给出了不同灵敏度截止和红移下的星系数量计数预测，基于此预测了SKA-MID宇宙学巡天的性能，并通过HOD拟合揭示了较小巡天区域内的样本方差。
AI.conclusion: 通过多模拟对比，量化了建模不确定性对HI星系分布预测的影响，为SKA-MID进行宇宙学大尺度结构研究提供了重要参考。

recommendation.reason: 该论文主要研究中性氢（HI）星系的21cm发射线巡天和宇宙学大尺度结构，属于射电天文学和宇宙学领域。用户的核心兴趣是强引力透镜，特别是星系-星系强透镜、高红移星系动力学和气体性质。虽然论文涉及暗物质和发射线等泛关键词，但科学问题、方法（模拟星系目录和HOD模型）和数据（SKA-MID射电巡天）与用户的主要研究方向几乎没有直接关联。论文不涉及强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学或用户核心作者。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低。论文主题为HI星系巡天和宇宙学，与用户强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学和气体的核心兴趣不匹配。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星系中中性氢（HI）的21厘米发射线提供了一种在射电波段进行精确光谱红移测定的方法。诸如SKA-MID等大型射电阵列即将上线，它们将具备所需的灵敏度和巡天时间，以编录数十万至数百万个HI星系，从而开启了利用该技术研究宇宙大尺度结构的可能性。然而，人们对这些星系的预期计数和成团性质仍知之甚少。我们使用三种不同的模拟星系目录来预测SKA-MID能够观测到的HI星系分布的性质，并给出了由于建模不确定性导致的这些预测的误差估计。所涉及的模拟分别来自S$^3$-SAX（基于Millennium暗物质-only模拟的半解析模型）、GAEA（一种部分基于流体动力学模拟校准的更新半解析模型）和IllustrisTNG（一种流体动力学模拟）。我们给出了作为灵敏度阈值和红移函数的星系计数预测，并利用这些预测来评估拟议的SKA-MID宇宙学巡天的宇宙学性能。最后，我们将暗晕占据分布模型拟合到低红移角相关函数上，以约束模拟的多个子体积的成团性质，从而深入了解在较小巡天面积上预期的变化（样本方差）。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要：通过多模拟对比，量化了建模不确定性对HI星系分布预测的影响，为SKA-MID进行宇宙学大尺度结构研究提供了重要参考。

The values for \(A_{eff}/T_{sys}\) , primary beam field of view, time per pointing \(t_{p}\) , and flux density rms (per beam) are given at the central frequency of the band.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：总观测时间为10,000小时、巡天面积为5,000平方度的巡天规格。\(A_{eff}/T_{sys}\)、主波束视场、每次指向时间\(t_{p}\)和通量密度均方根（每波束）的值均在该频段的中心频率处给出。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Distribution of Hi galaxies in 20 ∘ chunks of the TNG300 simulation box, for galaxies between \(0.01\leq z\leq 0.067\) . The galaxies are colour-coded according to their observed flux density for an observer at a fixed reference position in the simulation box. The total number of galaxies with flux density above \(100\ \mu\) Jy is stated at the top of each panel.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：TNG300模拟盒子中20度切片内的HI星系分布，星系位于\(0.01\leq z\leq 0.067\)之间。星系根据其在模拟盒子中固定参考位置处观测到的通量密度进行颜色编码。每个面板顶部标明了通量密度高于\(100\ \mu\)Jy的星系总数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: The mean halo mass (left) and cumulative number of galaxies above a flux density threshold, \(N(S>S_{rms})\) , (right) as a function of flux density cut for the nine different fields. The dash-dotted lines are the values for each field, while the solid line represents the mean across all nine fields.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：九个不同天区的平均暗晕质量（左）和高于通量密度阈值\(N(S>S_{rms})\)的星系累积数量（右）作为通量密度阈值的函数。点划线表示每个天区的值，实线表示所有九个天区的平均值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The number of galaxies as a function of halo mass and flux density threshold for one of the nine fields. At \(S_{rms}=800\,\mu\) Jy, there is notable gap in the number of high-mass haloes.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：九个天区之一中，作为暗晕质量和通量密度阈值函数的星系数量。在\(S_{rms}=800\,\mu\)Jy处，高质量暗晕的数量存在显著缺口。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: (Top row): The galaxy number density with different flux density cuts for the S 3 -SAX (solid), GAEA (dashed), and TNG100 (dash-dot) Hi simulations. The left panel is a zoom-in of the \(z\leq 0.4\) range of the right panel. The colours denote the fixed flux rms thresholds according to the colourbar labels. (Bottom row): The Hi bias with different flux cuts for S 3 -SAX (solid), GAEA (dash), and TNG100 (dash dot) Hi simulation, along with the observed bias with \(S_{rms}=2.4\) mJy from the ALFALFA survey (Obuljen et al. , 2019 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：（上行）：S$^3$-SAX（实线）、GAEA（虚线）和TNG100（点划线）HI模拟中不同通量密度阈值下的星系数密度。左面板是右面板中\(z\leq 0.4\)范围的放大图。颜色根据色标标签表示固定的通量均方根阈值。（下行）：S$^3$-SAX（实线）、GAEA（虚线）和TNG100（点划线）HI模拟中不同通量阈值下的HI偏置，以及来自ALFALFA巡天（Obuljen等人，2019年）的\(S_{rms}=2.4\) mJy观测偏置。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Forecast fractional errors on the expansion rate, \(H(z)\) , (left) and angular diameter distance, \(d_{A}(z)\) , (right) for the AA* and AA4 survey parameters, based on predicted number densities from S 3 -SAX and GAEA. The filled markers are for Band 2 and the unfilled ones are for Band 1.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：基于S$^3$-SAX和GAEA预测的数密度，对AA*和AA4巡天参数下膨胀率\(H(z)\)（左）和角直径距离\(d_{A}(z)\)（右）的预测分数误差。填充标记对应波段2，未填充标记对应波段1。
